instructions.1: Add 1/2 cup Greek yogurt to the bottom of a tall glass or mason jar.
instructions.2: Layer 1/4 cup granola over the yogurt.
instructions.3: Add a layer of mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries).
instructions.4: Repeat layers: yogurt, granola, berries.
instructions.5: Drizzle with 1 tbsp honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of sourdough bread until golden and crispy.
instructions.2: While bread toasts, halve the avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl. Mash with a fork, season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Crack 2 eggs into the pan and cook to your preference (2-3 min per side for over-easy).
instructions.4: Spread mashed avocado generously on each toast slice.
instructions.5: Top with a fried egg. Finish with red pepper flakes, flaky salt, and a scattering of microgreens.

instructions.1: Heat a cast iron skillet or frying pan over medium heat. Add 4 strips of bacon.
instructions.2: Cook bacon 3-4 min per side until crispy and browned. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
instructions.3: Pour off most of the bacon fat, leaving about 1 tbsp in the pan.
instructions.4: Crack 3 eggs into the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Cook 2-3 minutes per side for over-easy, or flip and cook 1 more minute for over-hard.
instructions.6: Serve eggs alongside the bacon with toast if desired.

instructions.1: Brown 3 strips of breakfast sausage in a non-stick pan, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Wipe the pan clean. Add 1/2 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Crack 2 eggs into the pan, scramble until just set, and remove from heat.
instructions.4: Place a large flour tortilla in the pan. Layer scrambled eggs, sausage crumbles, and 1/2 cup shredded cheddar on one half.
instructions.5: Fold the tortilla in half and press down gently. Cook 2 min per side until golden and cheese is melted.
instructions.6: Cut into wedges and serve with salsa and sour cream.

instructions.1: Add 1 frozen banana, 1 scoop protein powder (vanilla), 1/2 cup frozen mixed berries, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1/2 cup almond milk to a blender.
instructions.2: Blend on high until thick and smooth, adding more almond milk only if needed. Should be thick like soft-serve.
instructions.3: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.4: Top with sliced banana, additional berries, 2 tbsp granola, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.5: Drizzle with almond butter if desired and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Bring 3/4 cup water (or milk of choice) to a boil in a small saucepan.
instructions.2: Add 1/2 cup rolled oats and a pinch of salt. Reduce heat to medium-low.
instructions.3: Cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until oats are tender and mixture has thickened.
instructions.4: Remove from heat. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla extract and 1 tsp honey or maple syrup.
instructions.5: Top with 1/2 cup fresh mixed berries, 1 tbsp ground flaxseed, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

instructions.1: Brown 4 oz breakfast sausage or chorizo in a skillet, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: In the same pan, cook 2 beaten eggs, scrambling until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla in a dry pan or microwave.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp black beans (drained) on the tortilla.
instructions.5: Layer eggs, sausage, 1/4 cup shredded cheese, and 2 tbsp pico de gallo down the center.
instructions.6: Fold in the sides and roll tightly. Optional: grill seam-side down until golden.
instructions.7: Cut in half diagonally and serve with sour cream and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Whisk together 2 eggs, 1/3 cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla extract, 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a shallow dish.
instructions.2: Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Add 1 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Dip 2 thick slices of brioche or Challah bread into the egg mixture, letting each side soak for 15-20 seconds.
instructions.4: Place in the hot pan. Cook 3-4 min per side until golden brown.
instructions.5: Keep finished slices warm in a 200°F oven while cooking the rest.
instructions.6: Serve topped with fresh berries, a dusting of powdered sugar, and a drizzle of maple syrup.

instructions.1: In a large bowl, whisk 1 cup all-purpose flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp baking soda, and 1/4 tsp salt.
instructions.2: In another bowl, whisk 1 cup buttermilk, 2 eggs, 2 tbsp melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla.
instructions.3: Pour wet ingredients into dry. Stir until just combined — lumps are okay. Do not overmix.
instructions.4: Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat. Lightly butter the surface.
instructions.5: Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges look set, about 2-3 min. Flip and cook 1-2 min more.
instructions.6: Serve stacks with butter and warm maple syrup.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with butter or non-stick spray.
instructions.2: In a large bowl, whisk 8 eggs with 1/4 cup milk, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp black pepper.
instructions.3: Divide evenly among the muffin cups.
instructions.4: Top each with diced bell peppers, spinach, shredded cheese, and cooked crumbled bacon or mushrooms as desired.
instructions.5: Bake 20-25 minutes until eggs are set and tops are lightly golden.
instructions.6: Let cool 5 min before removing. Store leftovers in the fridge up to 4 days.

instructions.1: Add 1/2 cup Greek yogurt to the bottom of a tall glass or mason jar.
instructions.2: Layer 1/4 cup granola over the yogurt.
instructions.3: Add a layer of mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries).
instructions.4: Repeat layers: yogurt, granola, berries.
instructions.5: Drizzle with 1 tbsp honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of sourdough bread until golden and crispy.
instructions.2: While bread toasts, halve the avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl. Mash with a fork, season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Crack 2 eggs into the pan and cook to your preference (2-3 min per side for over-easy).
instructions.4: Spread mashed avocado generously on each toast slice.
instructions.5: Top with a fried egg. Finish with red pepper flakes, flaky salt, and microgreens.

instructions.1: Heat a cast iron skillet over medium heat. Add 4 strips of bacon.
instructions.2: Cook bacon 3-4 min per side until crispy. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
instructions.3: Pour off most of the bacon fat, leaving about 1 tbsp.
instructions.4: Crack 3 eggs into the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Cook 2-3 min per side for over-easy, or flip and cook 1 more minute for over-hard.
instructions.6: Serve eggs alongside the bacon.

instructions.1: Brown 3 oz breakfast sausage in a non-stick pan, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Wipe the pan clean. Add 1/2 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Scramble 2 eggs until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Place a large flour tortilla in the pan. Layer eggs, sausage crumbles, and 1/2 cup shredded cheddar on one half.
instructions.5: Fold the tortilla in half. Cook 2 min per side until golden and cheese is melted.
instructions.6: Cut into wedges. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

instructions.1: Add 1 frozen banana, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder, 1/2 cup frozen berries, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1/2 cup almond milk to a blender.
instructions.2: Blend on high until thick and smooth. Should be thick like soft-serve.
instructions.3: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.4: Top with sliced banana, additional berries, 2 tbsp granola, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.5: Drizzle with almond butter and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Bring 3/4 cup water or milk to a boil in a small saucepan.
instructions.2: Add 1/2 cup rolled oats and a pinch of salt. Reduce heat to medium-low.
instructions.3: Cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until oats are tender.
instructions.4: Remove from heat. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla and 1 tsp honey.
instructions.5: Top with 1/2 cup fresh berries, 1 tbsp ground flaxseed, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

instructions.1: Brown 4 oz breakfast sausage or chorizo in a skillet, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Scramble 2 eggs in the same pan until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla in a dry pan or microwave.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp black beans on the tortilla. Layer eggs, sausage, 1/4 cup shredded cheese, and 2 tbsp pico de gallo down the center.
instructions.5: Fold in the sides and roll tightly. Optional: grill seam-side down until golden.
instructions.6: Cut in half and serve with sour cream and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Whisk together 2 eggs, 1/3 cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla extract, 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and a pinch of salt.
instructions.2: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add 1 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Dip 2 thick slices of brioche or Challah bread into the egg mixture for 15-20 seconds per side.
instructions.4: Place in the hot pan. Cook 3-4 min per side until golden brown.
instructions.5: Keep finished slices warm in a 200°F oven while cooking the rest.
instructions.6: Serve topped with fresh berries, powdered sugar, and maple syrup.

instructions.1: In a large bowl, whisk 1 cup flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp baking soda, and 1/4 tsp salt.
instructions.2: In another bowl, whisk 1 cup buttermilk, 2 eggs, 2 tbsp melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla.
instructions.3: Pour wet ingredients into dry. Stir until just combined — lumps are okay. Do not overmix.
instructions.4: Heat a griddle over medium heat. Lightly butter the surface.
instructions.5: Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 min. Flip and cook 1-2 min more.
instructions.6: Serve with butter and warm maple syrup.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with butter or non-stick spray.
instructions.2: Whisk 8 eggs with 1/4 cup milk, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp black pepper.
instructions.3: Divide evenly among the muffin cups.
instructions.4: Top each with diced bell peppers, spinach, shredded cheese, and optional cooked bacon or mushrooms.
instructions.5: Bake 20-25 minutes until eggs are set and tops are lightly golden.
instructions.6: Let cool 5 min before removing. Store leftovers in the fridge up to 4 days.

instructions.1: Season 6 oz chicken breast with salt, pepper, and 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.2: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 5-6 min per side until internal temp reaches 165°F. Let rest 5 min, then slice.
instructions.3: In a large bowl, toss 4 cups chopped romaine lettuce with 3 tbsp Caesar dressing until well coated.
instructions.4: Add 2 tbsp parmesan cheese and toss again.
instructions.5: Transfer to a plate. Top with sliced chicken, extra parmesan, and 1/4 cup croutons.
instructions.6: Finish with freshly ground black pepper.

instructions.1: Drain 1 can (5 oz) tuna and place in a mixing bowl.
instructions.2: Add 2 tbsp mayonnaise, 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1/4 cup diced celery, and a splash of lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.3: Mix until well combined.
instructions.4: Toast 2 slices of bread to your preference.
instructions.5: Spread the tuna mixture on one slice. Top with sliced tomato, lettuce, and the other bread slice.
instructions.6: Cut diagonally and serve with chips or a side salad.

instructions.1: Cook 4 strips of bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 4 min per side. Transfer to paper towels.
instructions.2: Toast 2 slices of sourdough or white bread until golden.
instructions.3: Spread 1 tbsp mayonnaise on each bread slice.
instructions.4: Layer 2 slices tomato and several lettuce leaves on one slice.
instructions.5: Lay the bacon strips across the vegetables.
instructions.6: Close the sandwich, cut diagonally, and serve.

instructions.1: Warm 1 large whole wheat tortilla in a dry pan for 30 seconds per side.
instructions.2: Spread 2 tbsp hummus down the center of the tortilla.
instructions.3: Layer sliced avocado, cucumber ribbons, shredded carrots, bell pepper strips, and spinach.
instructions.4: Drizzle with 1 tsp balsamic glaze.
instructions.5: Fold in the sides, then roll tightly from the bottom.
instructions.6: Cut in half on the diagonal and serve.

instructions.1: Heat 1 tbsp butter in a skillet over medium heat.
instructions.2: Place 2 slices of sourdough bread in the pan. Top one slice with 2 oz sliced cheddar and 1 oz sliced American cheese.
instructions.3: Top with the second bread slice. Cook 3-4 min per side until golden and cheese is melted.
instructions.4: Meanwhile, heat 1 cup tomato soup in a small saucepan.
instructions.5: Cut the grilled cheese diagonally and serve alongside the warm soup.
instructions.6: Optional: dip the grilled cheese in the soup.

instructions.1: Rinse 1/2 cup quinoa. Combine with 1 cup water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer 15 min until water is absorbed. Fluff with fork.
instructions.2: Season 5 oz chicken breast with salt, pepper, and 1 tsp cumin.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan over medium-high. Cook chicken 5-6 min per side until 165°F. Rest 5 min, then slice.
instructions.4: In the same pan, sauté 1/2 cup black beans, 1/4 cup corn, and 1/4 cup diced tomatoes with a pinch of chili powder.
instructions.5: Assemble bowl: quinoa base, topped with chicken, bean-corn mixture, 1/4 cup pico de gallo, and 1/4 avocado.
instructions.6: Drizzle with lime juice and 1 tbsp Greek yogurt.

instructions.1: Heat oven to 375°F. Arrange 6 frozen or fresh falafel on a baking sheet.
instructions.2: Bake 12-15 min, flipping halfway, until heated through and crispy.
instructions.3: Warm 1 pita bread in the oven for 2 min.
instructions.4: Cut the pita in half. Fill each pocket with 3 falafel.
instructions.5: Top with 1/4 cup chopped cucumber, 2 tbsp tahini sauce, 1/4 cup shredded lettuce, and tomato slices.
instructions.6: Serve with pickled turnips on the side.

instructions.1: Slice 1 ciabatta roll in half horizontally. Toast lightly if desired.
instructions.2: Drizzle both interior surfaces with 1 tbsp olive oil and 1 tsp balsamic vinegar.
instructions.3: Layer 3 oz fresh mozzarella slices, 2 large tomato slices, and fresh basil leaves.
instructions.4: Season with flaky salt, cracked black pepper, and a light drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.
instructions.5: Close the sandwich, press gently, and cut in half.
instructions.6: Serve with a side of mixed greens.

instructions.1: Heat 1 tbsp sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
instructions.2: Add 1 lb ground chicken and cook, breaking apart, until browned, about 5 min.
instructions.3: Add 2 minced garlic cloves and 1 tsp fresh ginger. Cook 30 seconds.
instructions.4: Stir in 3 tbsp hoisin sauce, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, and a dash of sriracha.
instructions.5: Cook 2 more minutes until sauce thickens slightly.
instructions.6: Serve in butter lettuce cups. Top with sliced green onions, shredded carrots, and a squeeze of lime.

instructions.1: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add 1 diced onion, 2 carrots, and 2 celery stalks. Sauté 5 min.
instructions.2: Add 3 minced garlic cloves and 1 tsp Italian seasoning. Cook 1 min.
instructions.3: Add 4 cups vegetable broth, 1 can diced tomatoes, 1 can cannellini beans (drained), and 1/2 cup small pasta.
instructions.4: Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes until pasta is tender.
instructions.5: Add 1 cup chopped spinach and cook 2 more minutes until wilted.
instructions.6: Season with salt and pepper. Serve with a drizzle of olive oil and parmesan.

instructions.1: Slice 1 lb flank steak thinly against the grain. Toss with 1 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tbsp cornstarch. Set aside 10 min.
instructions.2: Mix remaining soy sauce (3 tbsp), 2 tbsp oyster sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp brown sugar, and 2 tbsp beef broth in a small bowl.
instructions.3: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a wok over high heat until smoking.
instructions.4: Add beef in a single layer. Sear 1-2 min until browned. Flip and cook 30 sec more. Remove to a plate.
instructions.5: Add 3 cups broccoli florets and 2 tbsp water to the wok. Cover and steam 2 min until bright green. Uncover, add 4 minced garlic cloves and 1 tsp ginger, stir-fry 30 sec.
instructions.6: Return beef to wok. Pour in sauce. Toss and cook 1-2 min until sauce thickens.
instructions.7: Serve immediately over steamed white rice.

instructions.1: Soak 8 oz rice noodles in warm water for 30 min until pliable. Drain.
instructions.2: Make the sauce: mix 3 tbsp fish sauce, 2 tbsp tamarind paste, 2 tbsp brown sugar, and 1 tbsp rice vinegar in a small bowl.
instructions.3: Heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil in a wok over high heat.
instructions.4: Add 6 oz medium shrimp (peeled) or chicken. Cook 2-3 min until done. Remove.
instructions.5: Add 2 beaten eggs to the wok, scramble until just set.
instructions.6: Add drained noodles and sauce. Toss 2-3 min until noodles absorb sauce.
instructions.7: Return protein to wok. Add 1 cup bean sprouts and 3 sliced green onions. Toss 1 min.
instructions.8: Serve with crushed peanuts, lime wedges, and extra fish sauce on the side.

instructions.1: Slice 1 lb chicken breast into bite-sized strips. Toss with 1 tbsp cornstarch, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and 1/2 tsp sesame oil.
instructions.2: Mix 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp oyster sauce, 1 tbsp rice wine, 1 tsp sugar, and 1/2 cup chicken broth for the sauce.
instructions.3: Heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil in a wok over high heat until smoking.
instructions.4: Add chicken in a single layer. Sear 2 min until golden. Flip and cook 1 min more. Remove.
instructions.5: Add 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 sliced red bell pepper, and 1/2 cup snap peas. Stir-fry 2 min.
instructions.6: Return chicken. Pour in sauce. Toss 1-2 min until sauce thickens and coats everything.
instructions.7: Serve over steamed white rice or lo mein noodles.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F.
instructions.2: Place 2 salmon fillets (6 oz each) on a lined baking sheet. Pat dry.
instructions.3: Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice. Season with salt, pepper, and 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.4: Arrange 1 bunch asparagus around the salmon. Drizzle asparagus with 1 tbsp olive oil and season.
instructions.5: Bake 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily and asparagus is tender.
instructions.6: Garnish with fresh dill and lemon wedges. Serve immediately.

instructions.1: Cut 1.5 lbs chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces. Pat dry.
instructions.2: Make the batter: whisk 3/4 cup cornstarch, 1/4 cup flour, 1 egg, 1/2 cup water, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
instructions.3: Dip chicken pieces in the batter. Fry in 350°F oil for 5-6 min until golden. Remove to wire rack.
instructions.4: Make sauce: combine 3 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 2 tbsp ketchup, 3 tbsp brown sugar, 1 tbsp minced garlic, 1 tsp ginger in a bowl.
instructions.5: Heat sauce in a saucepan until bubbling. thicken with 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water.
instructions.6: Toss fried chicken in the sauce until well coated.
instructions.7: Serve over steamed rice. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.

instructions.1: Toss 1 lb large shrimp (peeled and deveined) with 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp chili powder, 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/4 tsp paprika, salt and pepper.
instructions.2: Heat a grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
instructions.3: Cook shrimp 2-3 min per side until pink and curled.
instructions.4: Warm 6 small corn tortillas in a dry pan or directly over a gas flame.
instructions.5: Make slaw: toss 1 cup shredded purple cabbage, 2 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp lime juice, 1/2 tsp cumin, and a pinch of salt.
instructions.6: Assemble tacos: shrimp, cabbage slaw, pico de gallo, and sliced avocado.
instructions.7: Finish with a squeeze of lime and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Brown 1 lb ground beef in a large pot over medium-high heat, breaking into crumbles. Season with salt and pepper. Cook 5-7 min until browned. Remove beef, leave fat.
instructions.2: Add 1 diced onion to the pot. Sauté 3 min until softened.
instructions.3: Add 3 minced garlic cloves and 1 tsp Italian seasoning. Cook 1 min.
instructions.4: Return beef. Add 1 can crushed tomatoes, 1/2 cup beef broth, 2 tbsp tomato paste.
instructions.5: Simmer on low for 25-30 min, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens.
instructions.6: Meanwhile, cook 12 oz spaghetti according to package directions. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water before draining.
instructions.7: Toss drained pasta with sauce. Add pasta water as needed to loosen.
instructions.8: Serve topped with fresh parmesan and basil.

instructions.1: Season 2 chicken breasts (6 oz each) with salt, pepper, and 1 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.2: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken 5-6 min per side until internal temp 165°F. Rest 5 min, then slice.
instructions.3: Meanwhile, cook 12 oz fettuccine according to package directions. Reserve 1 cup pasta water. Drain.
instructions.4: In the same skillet, melt 3 tbsp butter over medium heat. Add 2 cloves minced garlic and cook 30 sec.
instructions.5: Add 1 cup heavy cream and 1/2 cup parmesan. Stir until melted and smooth.
instructions.6: Toss fettuccine with sauce, adding pasta water as needed.
instructions.7: Top with sliced chicken, extra parmesan, and fresh parsley.

instructions.1: Brown 1 lb ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.2: Add 2 tbsp taco seasoning (or mix: 1 tsp chili powder, 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/4 tsp paprika, pinch of garlic powder) and 1/4 cup water.
instructions.3: Simmer 3-4 min until liquid evaporates and beef is well coated.
instructions.4: Warm 8 taco shells in the oven at 350°F for 2-3 min.
instructions.5: Fill each shell with seasoned beef.
instructions.6: Top with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheddar, sour cream, and salsa.
instructions.7: Serve with lime wedges and jalapeños.

instructions.1: Pat 2 salmon fillets (6 oz each) dry. Brush with 1 tbsp olive oil.
instructions.2: Season generously with salt, pepper, and 1/2 tsp smoked paprika.
instructions.3: Heat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
instructions.4: Place salmon skin-side up on the grill. Cook 4-5 min until golden with char marks.
instructions.5: Flip carefully. Cook another 3-4 min until internal temp reaches 145°F.
instructions.6: Serve with lemon wedges and fresh dill. Pairs well with roasted potatoes or a side salad.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F. Pound 2 chicken breasts to even 1/2-inch thickness.
instructions.2: Set up breading station: flour in one dish, 2 beaten eggs in another, panko breadcrumbs mixed with 1/4 cup parmesan in a third.
instructions.3: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, dip in egg, coat in panko mixture.
instructions.4: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in an oven-safe skillet. Sear chicken 3 min per side until golden.
instructions.5: Top each breast with 1/4 cup marinara sauce and 1/4 cup mozzarella.
instructions.6: Bake 12-15 min until chicken is cooked through (165°F) and cheese is bubbly.
instructions.7: Serve over spaghetti with extra marinara and fresh basil.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F.
instructions.2: Cut 2 sweet potatoes into 1/2-inch rounds. Toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet.
instructions.3: Roast sweet potatoes for 15 min, then set aside.
instructions.4: Season 2 bone-in pork chops (8 oz each) with salt, pepper, 1 tsp paprika, and 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.5: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium-high. Sear pork chops 4 min per side.
instructions.6: Transfer to oven-safe pan with sweet potatoes. Bake 10-12 min until internal temp reaches 145°F.
instructions.7: Rest 5 min before serving. Garnish with fresh thyme.

instructions.1: Cook 8 oz lo mein noodles or spaghetti according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
instructions.2: Mix sauce: 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp brown sugar, and 1/2 tsp chili flakes.
instructions.3: Heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil in a wok over high heat.
instructions.4: Add 1 cup sliced mushrooms, 1 sliced red bell pepper, 1 cup shredded cabbage, and 1/2 cup shredded carrots.
instructions.5: Stir-fry 3-4 min until vegetables are crisp-tender.
instructions.6: Add noodles and sauce. Toss 2-3 min until well combined and noodles are heated through.
instructions.7: Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced green onions.

instructions.1: Rub 3 lb pork shoulder with: 1 tbsp brown sugar, 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp salt, and 1/2 tsp black pepper.
instructions.2: Place in a slow cooker with 1/2 cup apple cider vinegar and 1/2 cup water.
instructions.3: Cook on low for 8 hours or high for 4-5 hours until fork-tender.
instructions.4: Remove pork and shred with two forks, discarding fat.
instructions.5: Skim fat from cooking liquid. Mix 1 cup bbq sauce with 1/2 cup cooking liquid.
instructions.6: Toss shredded pork with the sauce mixture.
instructions.7: Serve on brioche buns topped with coleslaw.

instructions.1: Cook 12 oz linguine according to package directions. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water. Drain.
instructions.2: Heat 3 tbsp butter and 2 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
instructions.3: Add 1 lb large shrimp (peeled and deveined). Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Cook shrimp 2 min per side until pink. Remove.
instructions.5: Add 6 minced garlic cloves to the skillet. Cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
instructions.6: Add 1/2 cup white wine or chicken broth, 2 tbsp lemon juice, and 1/4 cup pasta water. Simmer 2 min.
instructions.7: Return shrimp. Add cooked linguine and toss everything together.
instructions.8: Garnish with 1/4 cup parsley and extra lemon.

instructions.1: Season 1 lb ground beef with 2 tbsp taco seasoning, salt, and pepper.
instructions.2: Brown the beef in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1/4 cup water and simmer 2 min.
instructions.3: Make cilantro-lime rice: combine 1 cup cooked white rice, 1 tbsp lime juice, and 1/4 cup chopped cilantro.
instructions.4: Build bowls: rice base, topped with seasoned beef, 1/2 cup black beans, 1/2 cup corn, 1/4 cup pico de gallo, 1/4 cup shredded cheese.
instructions.5: Add 1/4 sliced avocado and a dollop of sour cream.
instructions.6: Drizzle with 1 tbsp chipotle mayo or regular mayo mixed with lime juice.
instructions.7: Top with tortilla strips and extra cilantro.

instructions.1: Heat 4 cups vegetable broth in a saucepan and keep warm over low heat.
instructions.2: Sauté 8 oz mixed mushrooms (cremini, shiitake) in 2 tbsp butter until golden, about 5 min. Season with salt. Set aside.
instructions.3: In the same pan, melt 2 tbsp butter over medium. Add 1 shallot (minced) and 1 cup arborio rice. Toast 2 min, stirring.
instructions.4: Add 1/2 cup white wine and stir until absorbed.
instructions.5: Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring frequently, waiting until each addition is absorbed before adding more.
instructions.6: Continue for 18-20 min until rice is creamy and al dente.
instructions.7: Stir in sautéed mushrooms, 1/2 cup parmesan, and 1 tbsp butter. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.8: Serve immediately with extra parmesan and fresh thyme.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F.
instructions.2: Pat dry 2 chicken breasts. Season with salt, pepper, 1 tsp dried oregano, 1 tsp dried thyme, and 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high. Sear chicken 3 min per side until golden.
instructions.4: Slice 1 lemon and place lemon slices under and around the chicken in the pan.
instructions.5: Add 1/2 cup chicken broth and 2 tbsp butter to the pan.
instructions.6: Roast in oven 12-15 min until internal temp reaches 165°F.
instructions.7: Rest 5 min. Slice and serve drizzled with pan juices and fresh herbs.

instructions.1: Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a wok over medium heat.
instructions.2: Add 2-3 tbsp green curry paste and fry 1-2 min until fragrant.
instructions.3: Add 1 lb chicken breast (sliced) and coat in the paste. Cook 3 min.
instructions.4: Pour in 1 can coconut milk and 1/2 cup chicken broth.
instructions.5: Add 1 cup Thai basil leaves, 1 sliced red bell pepper, and 1/2 cup bamboo shoots.
instructions.6: Simmer 12-15 min until chicken is cooked through.
instructions.7: Season with 1 tbsp fish sauce and 1 tbsp palm sugar or brown sugar.
instructions.8: Serve over jasmine rice with Thai basil and sliced chilies.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 375°F.
instructions.2: Cut the tops off 4 bell peppers and remove seeds. Brush with olive oil and season inside.
instructions.3: Brown 1 lb ground turkey or beef in a skillet. Season with salt, pepper, and 1 tsp cumin.
instructions.4: Add 1 can diced tomatoes, 1/2 cup cooked rice, and 1/2 cup black beans. Mix well.
instructions.5: Stuff the mixture into each bell pepper. Place in a baking dish.
instructions.6: Add 1/2 cup water or broth to the dish. Cover with foil.
instructions.7: Bake 35 min. Remove foil, top with shredded cheese, bake 10 more min until cheese is bubbly.

instructions.1: Wash and slice 1 large apple into wedges.
instructions.2: Remove the core and seeds.
instructions.3: Serve with 2 tbsp natural peanut butter for dipping.
instructions.4: Optionally sprinkle apple slices with a little cinnamon.

instructions.1: Slice 1 cucumber into thick sticks.
instructions.2: Cut 1 bell pepper into strips.
instructions.3: Slice 2 medium carrots into sticks.
instructions.4: Arrange vegetables around a small bowl of hummus.
instructions.5: Season hummus with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of paprika.

instructions.1: Combine 1/4 cup almonds, 1/4 cup cashews, 1/4 cup walnuts in a bowl.
instructions.2: Add 1/4 cup raisins and 1/4 cup dried cranberries.
instructions.3: Add 2 tbsp dark chocolate chips.
instructions.4: Mix everything together and portion into servings.

instructions.1: Arrange 6-8 whole grain crackers on a plate.
instructions.2: Slice 2 oz of cheddar cheese into thin slices.
instructions.3: Lay cheese slices on the crackers.
instructions.4: Optionally add a slice of apple or grapes on the side.

instructions.1: Halve 1 ripe avocado, remove pit, and scoop into a bowl.
instructions.2: Mash with a fork to desired consistency.
instructions.3: Add 2 tbsp diced tomato, 1 tbsp minced onion, 1 tbsp cilantro, and 1 tbsp lime juice.
instructions.4: Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of cumin. Mix well.
instructions.5: Serve with tortilla chips.

instructions.1: Grab 1 store-bought or homemade protein bar.
instructions.2: Check the label for macros that fit your goals.
instructions.3: Best paired with a piece of fruit or glass of water.

instructions.1: Scoop 1/2 cup Greek yogurt into a bowl or glass.
instructions.2: Drizzle 1 tsp honey over the top.
instructions.3: Add a sprinkle of cinnamon if desired.
instructions.4: Top with a few almonds or granola for crunch.

instructions.1: Portion 1 oz of raw or roasted almonds (about 23 almonds).
instructions.2: Eat slowly and pair with a piece of fruit or glass of water.

instructions.1: Cut 4 oz fresh mozzarella into 1-inch cubes.
instructions.2: Cut 8 cherry tomatoes in half.
instructions.3: Roll each mozzarella cube in a basil leaf.
instructions.4: Thread onto small skewers: tomato, basil-mozzarella, tomato.
instructions.5: Arrange on a plate and drizzle with 1 tbsp balsamic glaze.
instructions.6: Season with flaky salt and cracked pepper.

instructions.1: Bring a small pot of salted water to a boil.
instructions.2: Add 1 cup frozen edamame in the pod.
instructions.3: Boil 4-5 minutes until tender.
instructions.4: Drain and toss with a pinch of sea salt.
instructions.5: Serve in a bowl — squeeze pods to release beans.

instructions.1: Cut 1.5 lbs chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces. Pat dry.
instructions.2: Make batter: whisk 3/4 cup cornstarch, 1/4 cup flour, 1 egg, 1/2 cup water. Dip chicken.
instructions.3: Deep fry at 350°F for 5-6 min until golden. Drain on wire rack.
instructions.4: Make orange sauce: combine 3 tbsp orange juice, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 3 tbsp sugar, 1 tbsp orange zest in a saucepan. Bring to simmer.
instructions.5: Thicken with 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water.
instructions.6: Toss fried chicken in the sauce until well coated.
instructions.7: Serve over steamed rice. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.

instructions.1: Preheat broiler to high.
instructions.2: Mix 2 tbsp white miso paste, 2 tbsp mirin, 2 tbsp sake, 1 tbsp sugar, and 1 tbsp soy sauce in a bowl until smooth.
instructions.3: Pat 4 cod fillets (5 oz each) dry. Place on a lined baking sheet.
instructions.4: Brush the miso glaze generously over the top and sides of each fillet.
instructions.5: Broil 4-5 minutes until glaze is caramelized and fish flakes easily.
instructions.6: Serve over steamed rice with edamame on the side.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F. Slice 2 eggplants into 1/2-inch rounds. Salt both sides and let sit 20 min to draw out moisture. Pat dry.
instructions.2: Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, and panko breadcrumbs mixed with 1/4 cup parmesan.
instructions.3: Dip eggplant slices in flour, egg, then breadcrumb mixture. Place on baking sheets.
instructions.4: Bake 20 min until golden and tender, flipping halfway.
instructions.5: In a baking dish, layer: marinara sauce, eggplant slices, mozzarella, parmesan. Repeat layers.
instructions.6: Top with remaining marinara and mozzarella. Bake 20 min until bubbly.
instructions.7: Let rest 5 min. Serve over spaghetti with fresh basil.

instructions.1: Slice 1 lb beef ribeye or sirloin very thinly against the grain.
instructions.2: Marinate in 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 2 tbsp brown sugar, 4 cloves minced garlic, 1 tsp ginger, and 2 tbsp water for 15 min.
instructions.3: Heat a grill pan or cast iron over high heat.
instructions.4: Cook beef in a single layer for 1-2 min per side until caramelized (work in batches).
instructions.5: Serve over steamed rice with kimchi.
instructions.6: Garnish with sesame seeds, sliced green onions, and a drizzle of gochujang.

instructions.1: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium heat.
instructions.2: Sauté 1 diced onion and 1 diced red bell pepper for 5 min. Add 3 cloves minced garlic, cook 1 min.
instructions.3: Add 1.5 cups Arborio rice and toast for 2 min, stirring.
instructions.4: Add 3 cups warm chicken broth, 1/2 tsp saffron threads, 1 tsp smoked paprika, and 1/2 cup white wine. Bring to simmer.
instructions.5: Arrange 8 oz shrimp, 8 oz mussels, and 6 oz calamari on top. DO NOT STIR after this point.
instructions.6: Simmer 20-25 min until rice is cooked and seafood is open and cooked through.
instructions.7: Let rest 5 min. Garnish with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F.
instructions.2: Cut 2 sweet potatoes into wedges. Toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast 15 min.
instructions.3: Season 2 bone-in pork chops (8 oz each) with salt, pepper, 1 tsp paprika, 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
instructions.4: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high. Sear pork chops 4 min per side.
instructions.5: Transfer to oven with sweet potatoes. Bake 10-12 min until internal temp 145°F.
instructions.6: Rest 5 min. Garnish with fresh thyme.

instructions.1: Rub 3 lb pork shoulder with 1 tbsp brown sugar, 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp pepper.
instructions.2: Slow cook with 1/2 cup apple cider vinegar and 1/2 cup water on low 8 hours.
instructions.3: Shred with forks, discarding fat.
instructions.4: Mix 1 cup BBQ sauce with 1/2 cup cooking liquid. Toss with pork.
instructions.5: Serve on brioche buns with coleslaw.

instructions.1: Cook 8 oz lo mein noodles. Drain and set aside.
instructions.2: Mix 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp brown sugar.
instructions.3: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a wok over high. Stir-fry 2 cups mixed vegetables 3-4 min.
instructions.4: Add noodles and sauce. Toss 2-3 min.
instructions.5: Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.

instructions.1: Slice 1.5 lbs chicken thighs into thin strips. Marinate in shawarma spices (1 tsp each: cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, cinnamon, cardamom) + 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp lemon juice for 20 min.
instructions.2: Heat a grill pan or cast iron over high heat.
instructions.3: Cook chicken in batches, 3-4 min per side until charred and cooked through.
instructions.4: Serve over pita bread with tahini sauce, sliced cucumber, tomato, pickled turnips, and fries.

ingredients.Shawarma spice blend: 2 tsp each cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, cinnamon, cardamom

instructions.1: Heat 1 can black beans (drained) in a skillet with 1 tsp cumin, 1/2 tsp chili powder, salt, and a splash of lime juice.
instructions.2: Mash about half the beans, leaving the rest whole for texture.
instructions.3: Warm 6 small corn tortillas.
instructions.4: Fill each tortilla with seasoned black beans.
instructions.5: Top with shredded cabbage, pico de gallo, avocado slices, and sour cream.
instructions.6: Finish with a squeeze of lime and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Cook 1 cup quinoa according to package directions. Fluff and let cool slightly.
instructions.2: Make lemon-tahini dressing: whisk 2 tbsp tahini, 1 tbsp lemon juice, 1 clove minced garlic, 2 tbsp water until smooth.
instructions.3: Arrange quinoa in bowls. Top with 1/2 cup chickpeas, 1/4 cup cucumber, 1/4 cup tomatoes, 2 tbsp red onion, 1/4 cup feta cheese, and 1/4 cup kalamata olives.
instructions.4: Drizzle generously with tahini dressing.
instructions.5: Season with salt, pepper, and za'atar if available.

instructions.1: Toast 3 slices of white or sourdough bread.
instructions.2: Spread mayo on one side of each slice.
instructions.3: Layer: lettuce and tomato on first slice, then layer turkey and bacon on second slice, then lettuce and cheese on third slice.
instructions.4: Stack and secure with toothpicks. Cut diagonally into quarters.
instructions.5: Serve with chips and a pickle.

instructions.1: Cook 1 cup sushi rice according to package. Season with 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp sugar, and 1 tsp salt. Let cool.
instructions.2: Make spicy mayo: mix 2 tbsp mayo, 1 tbsp sriracha, 1 tsp lime juice.
instructions.3: Slice 4 oz sushi-grade salmon or tuna into bite-sized pieces.
instructions.4: Arrange rice in bowls. Top with salmon/tuna, 1/2 avocado sliced, 1/4 cup cucumber, 1/4 cup edamame, and 1 sheet nori (cut into strips).
instructions.5: Drizzle with spicy mayo and soy sauce. Top with sesame seeds and sriracha roe.

instructions.1: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium. Sauté 1 diced onion, 2 carrots, and 2 celery stalks for 5 min.
instructions.2: Add 3 cloves minced garlic and 1 tsp dried thyme. Cook 1 min.
instructions.3: Add 8 cups chicken broth and 1 bay leaf. Bring to boil.
instructions.4: Add 6 oz chicken breast. Simmer 15 min until cooked through. Remove and shred, then return to pot.
instructions.5: Add 6 oz egg noodles. Cook 6-8 min until tender.
instructions.6: Season with salt and pepper. Remove bay leaf.
instructions.7: Serve with fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon.

instructions.1: Season 6 oz flank steak with salt and pepper.
instructions.2: Heat a grill pan over high. Cook steak 4-5 min per side for medium-rare. Rest 5 min, then slice thinly.
instructions.3: Make balsamic vinaigrette: whisk 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar, 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1/4 cup olive oil, salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Toss 4 cups mixed greens with half the vinaigrette.
instructions.5: Top with sliced steak, 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, 1/4 cup crumbled blue cheese, and 1/4 cup candied walnuts.
instructions.6: Drizzle remaining vinaigrette over the top.

instructions.1: Season 5 oz chicken breast with salt and pepper. Bake or pan-fry until cooked through. Let rest 5 min, then slice.
instructions.2: Toss sliced chicken with 2-3 tbsp buffalo sauce (such as Frank's RedHot).
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp ranch dressing on the tortilla.
instructions.5: Layer shredded lettuce, celery sticks, blue cheese crumbles, and buffalo chicken down the center.
instructions.6: Roll tightly, tucking in the sides. Cut in half diagonally.

instructions.1: Bring 4 cups chicken or pork broth to a boil.
instructions.2: Season with 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp miso paste, and a pinch of ginger.
instructions.3: Cook 6 oz ramen noodles according to package. Drain.
instructions.4: Soft boil 1 egg: lower into boiling water for 6.5 min, then transfer to ice bath.
instructions.5: Place noodles in bowl. Ladle hot broth over.
instructions.6: Top with sliced pork belly or chashu, a soft-boiled egg, nori sheet, bamboo shoots, and green onions.
instructions.7: Finish with sesame oil drizzle.

instructions.1: Cut 2 large tomatoes into wedges, 1 cucumber into half-moons, and 1/4 red onion into thin slices.
instructions.2: Combine in a large bowl with 1/2 cup kalamata olives.
instructions.3: Crumble 3 oz feta cheese over the top.
instructions.4: Dress with 3 tbsp extra virgin olive oil, 1 tbsp red wine vinegar, 1/2 tsp dried oregano, salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Toss gently and serve.

instructions.1: Dice 1 medium sweet potato into 1/2-inch cubes. Toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 400°F for 20 min.
instructions.2: Meanwhile, brown 4 oz breakfast sausage in a cast iron skillet. Remove.
instructions.3: In the same pan, sauté 1/2 diced onion and 1/2 diced bell pepper until softened.
instructions.4: Add 1 cup kale or spinach and cook until wilted.
instructions.5: Return sausage to pan. Add roasted sweet potato. Toss together.
instructions.6: Make 2 wells and crack 2 eggs into the gaps. Cover and cook until eggs are set.
instructions.7: Garnish with hot sauce and green onions.

instructions.1: Slice 1 everything bagel in half. Toast until golden.
instructions.2: Spread 2 tbsp cream cheese on each half.
instructions.3: Layer 3 oz smoked salmon on top.
instructions.4: Add 4 cucumber slices and 2 slices red onion.
instructions.5: Top with fresh dill, capers, and a squeeze of lemon.
instructions.6: Season with cracked black pepper.

instructions.1: Blend 1 pack frozen acai (100g), 1 frozen banana, 1/2 cup frozen mixed berries, and 1/4 cup almond milk until thick and smooth.
instructions.2: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.3: Top with: sliced banana, fresh berries, 2 tbsp granola, 1 tbsp coconut flakes, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.4: Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Whisk 3 eggs with 1 tbsp milk, salt, and pepper.
instructions.2: Heat 1 tbsp butter in a non-stick pan over medium.
instructions.3: Pour in eggs and let set 30 seconds.
instructions.4: Add fillings to one half: 1/4 cup sautéed mushrooms, 1/4 cup spinach, 2 tbsp diced bell pepper, 1/4 cup shredded cheese.
instructions.5: Cover and cook 2 min until cheese melts.
instructions.6: Fold omelette in half. Slide onto plate.

instructions.1: In a mason jar or container, combine 1/2 cup rolled oats, 1/2 cup milk, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.2: Stir in 1 tbsp maple syrup or honey.
instructions.3: Add 1/4 tsp vanilla extract and a pinch of cinnamon.
instructions.4: Stir well, cover, and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours).
instructions.5: In the morning, top with fresh berries, sliced banana, and a sprinkle of granola.

instructions.1: Preheat your waffle iron. Whisk 1.5 cups flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1.5 tsp baking powder, 1/4 tsp salt in a bowl.
instructions.2: Whisk 1.25 cups milk, 1 egg, 1/4 cup melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla in another bowl.
instructions.3: Pour wet into dry. Stir until just combined (lumps okay).
instructions.4: Pour batter into preheated waffle iron. Cook until golden and steam stops, about 4-5 min.
instructions.5: Serve immediately with butter and warm maple syrup. Top with fresh berries.

instructions.1: Add to blender: 1 frozen banana, 1 cup milk, 1/2 cup frozen mango chunks, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp almond butter, and 1/2 tsp vanilla.
instructions.2: Blend on high until smooth and creamy.
instructions.3: Pour into a tall glass.
instructions.4: Drink immediately.

instructions.1: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium.
instructions.2: Add 1 diced onion and 1 diced bell pepper. Sauté 5 min until softened.
instructions.3: Add 4 minced garlic cloves, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, and 1/2 tsp chili flakes. Cook 1 min.
instructions.4: Add 1 can crushed tomatoes (28 oz) and 1 tsp sugar. Simmer 10 min until sauce thickens.
instructions.5: Make 4 wells in the sauce. Crack an egg into each well.
instructions.6: Cover and cook 5-7 min until egg whites are set but yolks are still runny.
instructions.7: Garnish with feta cheese, fresh parsley, and serve with crusty bread.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of whole grain bread until golden.
instructions.2: Spread 2 tbsp peanut butter on each slice.
instructions.3: Slice 1 banana and arrange on top.
instructions.4: Drizzle with 1 tsp honey and sprinkle with cinnamon.
instructions.5: Optional: add a few chocolate chips or chia seeds.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 400°F.
instructions.2: Drain and rinse 1 can chickpeas. Pat very dry with paper towels.
instructions.3: Toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp cumin, 1/2 tsp garlic powder, 1/2 tsp paprika, salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Spread in a single layer on a baking sheet.
instructions.5: Roast 25-30 min, shaking the pan every 10 min, until golden and crispy.
instructions.6: Let cool slightly before eating (they get crunchier as they cool).

instructions.1: Break off 2 squares (40g) of dark chocolate (70%+ cacao).
instructions.2: Eat slowly, letting it melt in your mouth.
instructions.3: Pair with a handful of almonds or a glass of water.

instructions.1: Scoop 1/2 cup cottage cheese into a bowl.
instructions.2: Top with 1/4 cup fresh berries or sliced peaches.
instructions.3: Drizzle with 1 tsp honey.
instructions.4: Sprinkle with a pinch of cinnamon.

instructions.1: Bring a pot of water to boil. Gently lower 4 eggs in. Boil 10 min. Transfer to ice bath. Peel.
instructions.2: Halve eggs lengthwise. Pop yolks into a bowl.
instructions.3: Mash yolks with 2 tbsp mayonnaise, 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1 tsp white wine vinegar, salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Add 1 tbsp sweet pickle relish and mix well.
instructions.5: Pipe or spoon filling back into egg white halves.
instructions.6: Top with smoked paprika and fresh chives.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 375°F.
instructions.2: Slice 6 mini bell peppers in half lengthwise. Remove seeds.
instructions.3: Mix 4 oz cream cheese, 1/4 cup shredded cheddar, 2 tbsp cooked corn, and 1 tbsp diced jalapeño.
instructions.4: Stuff each pepper half with the cream cheese mixture.
instructions.5: Bake 12-15 min until peppers are tender and filling is bubbly.
instructions.6: Garnish with cilantro and serve warm.

instructions.1: Add 1 frozen banana, 1/2 cup frozen mixed berries, 1 cup almond milk, and 1 tbsp honey to a blender.
instructions.2: Blend until smooth.
instructions.3: Pour into a glass and drink immediately.

instructions.1: Wash and dry 3 celery stalks. Cut into 3-inch pieces.
instructions.2: Fill each celery piece with 1 tbsp cream cheese.
instructions.3: Optional: top with raisins or everything bagel seasoning.

instructions.1: Wash and dice: 1/2 cup strawberries, 1/4 cup pineapple chunks, 1/4 cup blueberries, 1/4 cup grapes.
instructions.2: Combine in a bowl.
instructions.3: Toss with 1 tbsp lime juice and a pinch of mint.
instructions.4: Chill until ready to serve.

instructions.1: Season 5 oz chicken breast with salt and pepper. Bake or pan-fry until cooked through. Slice.
instructions.2: Toss chicken with 2-3 tbsp buffalo sauce.
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp ranch dressing. Layer lettuce, celery, blue cheese crumbles, and buffalo chicken.
instructions.5: Roll tightly. Cut in half diagonally.

instructions.1: Cut tomatoes into wedges, cucumber into half-moons, and red onion into thin slices.
instructions.2: Combine with kalamata olives.
instructions.3: Crumble feta cheese over the top.
instructions.4: Dress with olive oil, red wine vinegar, dried oregano, salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Toss gently and serve.

instructions.1: Toast 3 slices of bread. Spread mayo on one side of each slice.
instructions.2: Layer lettuce and tomato on first slice, turkey and bacon on second slice, lettuce and cheese on third slice.
instructions.3: Stack and secure with toothpicks. Cut diagonally into quarters.

instructions.1: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery in olive oil for 5 min. Add garlic and thyme.
instructions.2: Add broth and bay leaf. Bring to boil. Add chicken breast.
instructions.3: Simmer 15 min. Remove chicken, shred, return to pot.
instructions.4: Add egg noodles. Cook 6-8 min.
instructions.5: Season. Remove bay leaf. Serve with parsley and lemon.

instructions.1: Slice everything bagel in half. Toast.
instructions.2: Spread cream cheese on each half.
instructions.3: Layer smoked salmon, cucumber, and red onion.
instructions.4: Top with fresh dill, capers, and lemon squeeze. Season with pepper.
